title: Medical Laboratory Technician
description: AbbVie seeks a Medical Laboratory Technician to perform essential laboratory analyses that support clinical and research operations.
responsibilities: Perform routine and specialized laboratory tests on biological specimens
Prepare samples for analysis and maintain proper specimen handling
Operate and maintain laboratory equipment and instruments
Document results accurately and maintain quality assurance protocols
Follow safety and infection control procedures
Troubleshoot equipment issues and report maintenance needs

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
